name: Excel Transport LLC
registry_source: Texas Secretary of State (SOSDirect) - not directly verified; no public free record found via web search
notes: No USDOT (likely intrastate). FMCSA SAFER wildcard search for *EXCEL TRANSPORT* returned 35+ entities but none located in San Antonio, TX (1635 Columbia Sq, 78227). Closest TX matches were Dallas Excel Transportation (USDOT 2087393, Dallas) and Excel Transport (USDOT 2236010, Wills Point TX) - neither at the subject address. Multiple similarly-named Excel Transport/Logistics entities exist nationally; unable to confirm a TX SOS entity tied to 1635 Columbia Sq without paid SOSDirect access.

name: Nostalgia Limo
registry_source: Maryland SDAT Business Express - no public match identified via web search
notes: No USDOT (likely intrastate, small limo operator). FMCSA SAFER wildcard search *NOSTALGIA* returned 10 carriers (Nostalgia Motors NJ, Nostalgia Homes MN, Nostalgia Oak Warehouse NJ/NY, etc.) - none are a limo carrier in Gwynn Oak MD. Address 3 Russell Ct, Gwynn Oak 21207 appears to be a residential address, consistent with a single-vehicle/owner-operator livery. Maryland SDAT entity not located via free search; entity may be registered as a trade name or under owner's personal name.

name: Woodland Wheelchair Svc Inc
entity_status: active (per OpenCorporates / BBB; one source notes inactive as of 2016-02-29, but BBB profile and local listings indicate continuing operation; physical operating address 155 Johnson Creek Rd / 225 Robinson Rd, Woodland WA 98674)
registry_source: Washington Secretary of State (UBI 601526715, via OpenCorporates) and BBB
notes: No USDOT (likely intrastate). FMCSA SAFER wildcard searches for WOODLAND WHEELCHAIR and WOODLAND WHEEL returned zero records. Company is a long-running non-emergency medical transport / wheelchair van operator established 1992 (BBB) / incorporated 1994-02-23 (WA SOS). Mailing address PO Box 2045 Woodland WA 98674; physical 155 Johnson Creek Rd / 225 Robinson Rd Woodland WA. Phone 360-281-5575. President Carolyn Trice. Some discrepancy on entity_status between sources (active vs lapsed 2016).

name: Seacoast Chair Car Svc LLC
entity_status: active (operating per BBB profile; 27 years in business as of profile date)
registry_source: New Hampshire Secretary of State QuickStart (not directly retrieved due to portal access); BBB profile cross-reference
notes: No USDOT (likely intrastate). FMCSA SAFER wildcard searches for SEACOAST CHAIR returned zero records; *SEACOAST* search returned other unrelated Seacoast businesses in NH (Garage Pros, Snack Distributors, Fuel, Harley-Davidson) - none match. Seacoast Chair Car Service LLC is a Hampton NH non-emergency medical/wheelchair transport operator. Address 467 Lafayette Rd, Hampton NH 03842 (PO Box 1093, Hampton NH 03843). Phone (603) 926-5801. Owner Stephen MacInnes. Founded 1999 per BBB; ~10-19 employees, $500K-$1M revenue estimate.

name: Real Time Transport Corp
entity_status: active (Texas SOS file 0801564531 per OpenCorporates; active SAM.gov entity per OpenGovUS)
registry_source: Texas Secretary of State file # 0801564531 (via OpenCorporates / OpenGovUS SAM)
notes: No USDOT (likely intrastate paratransit/NEMT). FMCSA SAFER wildcard search *REAL TIME* returned 15 carriers - none located in Irving TX (Dallas-area match REAL TIME EXPRESS INC USDOT 4022332 is in Dallas, unrelated freight). Real Time Transport Corp is a minority-owned (African-American) assisted/paratransit operator serving Collin, Dallas, and Rockwall counties. Address 2206 Century Center Blvd, Irving TX 75062-4900. Phone (469) 524-3302 / (214) 217-6374. ~8 employees, ~$826K-$964K revenue. President Mohamed Dahab. Texas SOS file 0801564531; SAM UEI PLD1MTF73DK3. Incorporated in Texas in 2014.
